name: Hauntingly Good Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
Use 1 bag of microwave popcorn. Do not use lite or air-popped popcorn as seasonings will not stick to it.
In a large bowl, toss together popcorn, dried apples, dried cranberries, raisins, and walnuts.
In a small bowl, combine brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and cinnamon.
Add the mixture to the popcorn and toss until the popcorn is evenly coated.
